## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is gradually improving; mid-late January expected for better insights on new batch](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Shifting focus: 60-70% on refreshing existing content, 30-40% on new content for faster site improvements](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Metadata experiencing significant lead volume increase, nearly reaching Q1/Q2 goals; all hands supporting sales](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Potential upcoming hiring push at Metadata to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Slight lift in impressions, not a massive spike](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Overall drop in impressions past week, coinciding with new articles going live](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Refreshed content performing well, potentially due to existing context and smaller, bite-sized chunks](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Programmatic content creation could be effective for highly templatized sections](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### Content Quality and Publishing Process

  - [Some issues with external links to potential competitors identified](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Need to create a list of URLs to avoid linking to](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Importance of balancing product and service mentions in content](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Tagging system for categorizing content needs investigation](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Website Optimization Ideas

  - [Proposed "Get Started" page to showcase multiple engagement options (demo, trial, managed service)](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Could help socialize managed service option more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Potential for modal forms or similar UI elements to streamline user journey](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Metadata Business Update

  - [Significant increase in lead volume and demos scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Moving away from gift card incentives for demos](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [New feature "Spotlight" competing with tools like RollWorks and ZoomInfo](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Offering comprehensive sales and marketing enablement ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Next Steps and Workflow

  - [Focus on refreshing existing content (60-70%) while continuing new content creation (30-40%)](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Anthony to upload images directly to Airtable for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [GrowthX team to stage additional content before holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Friday set as cutoff for content submissions before the break](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anthony to investigate content tagging system with dev team](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up with Sedera about tagging process](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Anthony to prioritize refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [GrowthX to add file upload column in Airtable for image submissions](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Team to stage additional content before Friday cutoff](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of new and refreshed content into January](https://fathom.video/share/w7UgXz4zyFJYUfzhYHEyhSAvDwprQU3k?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
